title: Sunday Service Highlights
speaker: RFI Pastorate
description: Join us for our latest Sunday service highlights as we enter the new year with faith and expectation.

title: Walking in Faithful Stewardship
speaker: RFI Pastorate
description: A teaching on what it means to be faithful stewards of the manifold grace of God in every area of life.

title: The Power of Discipleship
speaker: RFI Pastorate
description: Exploring the call of every believer to make disciples who make disciples, and what that looks like practically.

title: Building the House of God
speaker: RFI Pastorate
description: A vision message about what God is building through Revival Fellowship International for the nation of Lesotho.

title: Prayer That Moves Mountains
speaker: RFI Pastorate
description: A call to fervent, faith-filled prayer as the foundation of everything we do as a church and as individuals.

title: Raising Godly Families
speaker: RFI Pastorate
description: Practical biblical wisdom for building homes that honour God, nurture children in faith, and strengthen marriages.
